hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.(php)$'; then ./vendor/bin/pint --quiet $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS && ./vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>&1 || echo 'PINT_OR_PHPSTAN_FAILED'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|drop database|migrate:fresh.*--force|git push.*--force.*main)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: comando perigoso'; exit 2; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude terminou em $(basename $PWD)" with title "Claude Code"'
